mapper.sql: id, follower_id, followee_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE followee_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId} AND deleted = 0
